prompt: Add subtle pitch variation to the chord pads — use slight chord voicing inversions across bars so it doesn't feel static.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

    n 36

    n 36

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly applied chord inversions by shifting the root note up an octave for the latter half of the progressions.
judgment.quality_reason: The AI omitted the parentheses needed to group the notes into chords, which will cause a sequencing error against the 4-step pattern.
